title: Information Retrieval Module 5 CIE Process Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the stages and decision points in the Continuous Internal Evaluation (CIE) process for an Information Retrieval module.
relationships: Student completes Formative and Summative Assessments which are Evaluated; Feedback is provided to the Student; Scores are recorded in the Database; the Database is used to calculate the Final CIE Score
